title: ageratinastrum fruticosum
intro: Ageratinastrum fruticosum is a plant species also known as the 'Wild Sage' or 'White Sage', belonging to the family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, helping to alleviate conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its high content of essential oils, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health concerns. Herbal preparations of Ageratinastrum fruticosum are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
